violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store cans of food items off floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Refrigerator/freezer, reach in cooler, & cooking equipment needs cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. General cleaning needed.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Re-install hand towel dispenser at hand sink.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Wall and/or ceiling covering material was not light colored as required. Wall along cook line painted dark color.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors are dirty with debris and grease. Clean before next event.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Floor panels shifting. Floor not completed under cold hold units. Hole in floor near grill.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light above 3 tub sink not provided with shielding.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. Unit not sealed properly. Hole drilled in floor.
